review-pr.description: Review a Graphite PR in an isolated worktree

new-feature.description: Start a new feature in a dedicated worktree

resume-work.description: Resume work on an existing feature/stack

worktree-status.description: Show status of all Claude worktrees

commands: gt stack --oneline 2>/dev/null || echo 'Not a Graphite stack'

environment.CLAUDE_DEFAULT_SPARSE_PATHS: app config db lib test Gemfile* package.json

prompts.pr_review: When reviewing PRs, always check the full stack context with 'gt stack' and understand the changes in relation to the entire feature
prompts.commit_message: Use conventional commit format (feat:, fix:, chore:) and keep messages concise but descriptive
prompts.worktree_hygiene: Remind user to run 'prune-worktrees' periodically to clean up merged branches
